title: Coursera India International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Coursera India International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Coursera India International Enterprises in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Coursera India International Enterprises:
Coursera India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India International Enterprises!
